servinfo.title: Driver Air Bag (Inflator) Module Removal and Installation

item.ptxt: When handling an air bag (inflator) module, be sure to read Precautions for Handling and Storage of Air Bag System Components and observe each instruction. Failure to follow them could cause damage to driver air bag (inflator) module or result in personal injury.
Never insert foreign matter such as flat-end screwdriver between driver air bag (inflator) module and “S121” connector as static electricity may cause accidental deployment.

attention3.ptxt: Refer to Repair and Inspection Required after Accident before replacing deployed air bag.

s1.ptxt: Remove driver air bag (inflator) module bolts (2) of driver air bag (inflator) module at both sides of steering wheel (1) using TORX® wrench (T30).
Disconnect driver air bag (inflator) module connector (2) as shown in figure.
Remove driver air bag (inflator) module from steering wheel.

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Lock connector for driver air bag (inflator) module securely.
Tighten driver air bag (inflator) module bolts to specified torque.
